Kurye.title: Become a Lokma Courier, Be Your Own Boss!
Kurye.subtitle: Work with flexible hours and determine your own earnings. Be a part of the LOKMA family while delivering the neighborhood's freshest flavors.
Kurye.benefitFlexDesc: You decide when and how much you work.
Kurye.benefitEarnDesc: Know your earnings for each delivery in advance, no surprises.
Kurye.benefitSupportDesc: You are never alone on the road, our live support team is always with you.
Kurye.step1Desc: Fill out the short form and send us your information.
Kurye.step2Desc: Easily upload the required documents through our online system.
Kurye.step3Desc: Complete our short online training to learn the LOKMA standards.
Kurye.step4Desc: Get your equipment and start earning immediately.

Landing.b2bSubtitle: At LOKMA, we value the work of our vendors. No hidden fees, no complicated contracts. Just growth and fair earnings.
Landing.b2bTitle: Standing by Vendors, on the Path to the Future.
Landing.discoverSubtitle: Local shops, fresh products, fast delivery. Fresh. Fast. Local.
Landing.easyManagementDesc: Control everything with the user-friendly mobile panel.
Landing.fairCommissionDesc: We protect your earnings with the lowest rates in the industry.
Landing.faq1A: LOKMA is a digital marketplace that brings together local vendors and customers. Butchers, markets, florists and more on one platform.
Landing.faq2A: Download the app, select your location and discover the nearest businesses. Add products to your cart and complete your order with secure payment.
Landing.faq3A: Delivery fees vary by region and business. The delivery fee is clearly shown before ordering.
Landing.faq3Q: How much is the delivery fee?
Landing.faq4A: Click "Become a Partner" and fill out the application form. Our team will contact you within 24 hours.
Landing.faq4Q: How can I join as a vendor?
Landing.fastPaymentDesc: Manage your cash flow with instant payment systems instead of weekly.
Landing.heroSubtitle: Order from the best restaurants in your area. With Lokma.shop, you support local businesses right on your street.
Landing.wideAudienceDesc: Reach thousands of customers in your area with our digital advertising power.
Landing.splitCourierDesc: Work with flexible hours, set your own schedule, and earn under fair conditions as a part of the LOKMA family.
Landing.splitPartnerDesc: Join LOKMA, digitize your business, and reach thousands of new customers. Start earning with low commissions and fair conditions.
Landing.whyFairDesc: We support our local businesses by taking a minimum commission to help them grow.
Landing.whyFastDesc: Your orders are delivered to your door quickly and securely by couriers from your neighborhood.
Landing.whyWideDesc: From the butcher to the greengrocer, from the florist to the restaurant – all your daily needs in one app.
Landing.appDownloadDesc: All categories, exclusive offers and real-time delivery tracking in our app.

Partner.title: Get What You Earn: Join Lokma!
Partner.subtitle: Meet our merchant-friendly platform. Your earnings are our priority.
Partner.benefitCommDesc: Get the full value of your hard work with the fairest and lowest commission rates in the industry.
Partner.benefitPayDesc: No waiting for weeks. Your payments are in your account quickly and regularly.
Partner.benefitControlDesc: Easily manage your menu, working hours, and orders from your dedicated merchant panel.
Partner.benefitVisDesc: Reach more people and increase your sales thanks to our large customer network.
Partner.step1Desc: Fill out the form and submit your documents.
Partner.step2Desc: We quickly prepare your menu and panel.
